_setup_instructions: 3. Install MetaTrader 5 and connect to your broker demo account
4. Fill MT5_LOGIN, MT5_PASSWORD, MT5_SERVER in soul-ai-trade-agent/.env
5. Remove the _disabled field from this file to enable the MCP server
6. Restart Claude Code — it will connect to MT5 automatically
7. Test: ask Claude 'Show me the current XAUUSD bid and ask price'
